practical.nearestEmbassy: Needs verification — depends on your nationality; ask your AI to add your embassy in Tokyo
practical.hospitalOrClinic: Needs verification — English-friendly clinic near your home base
practical.transitTips: Get a Suica or Pasmo IC card (physical or in your phone wallet) for trains, subways, buses, and convenience stores.
practical.tipping: Tipping is not customary in Japan and can cause confusion; excellent service is standard.
keyPhrases: Eigo no menyuu wa arimasu ka? — do you have an English menu?
